def positive_temporary_collection_in_loop():
    rule_id = "temporary_collection_in_loop"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Loop-local list, dict, or set construction that likely adds avoidable allocation churn."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
